title: rubus calycinus var. pectinelloides
intro: Rubus calycinus var. pectinelloides, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry Leaf, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus calycinus var. pectinelloides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
